# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates an attribute name dictionary key from a string value.

## Declaration

```swift
init(rawValue: String)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: A string value to use as an attribute name dictionary key.
title: init(rawValue:)
